money_flow_summary: Money flows from students and employers through course platforms (Coursera, Udemy), universities, and corporate L&D budgets. AI has disrupted both content creation (courses can be generated in days, not months) and delivery (personalized tutoring AI vs. static video). The solo opportunity: AI tutors that replace $50-$150/hr human tutors, and automated course creation for corporate training.

niches.name: AI Writing & Research Assistant for Students

top_opportunities.title: AI Corporate Training Content Factory
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that takes company policy documents, SOPs, and compliance requirements and generates SCORM-compliant e-learning modules with quizzes, interactive scenarios, and assessments. Companies pay $5,000-$50,000 per course to instructional designers; your tool generates the same quality in 2 hours at $299-$999/mo. Target HR teams at 100-5,000 employee companies.
top_opportunities.moat: Integrated LMS connectors create lock-in; existing course library per company creates switching cost
top_opportunities.first_step: Build PDF → SCORM module generator; create 3 demo courses (compliance, onboarding, product training); cold email 20 HR managers on LinkedIn
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI converts dry policy text into engaging scenarios, generates realistic workplace dialogue for interactive scenarios, and creates assessment questions — replacing a $150/hr instructional designer

top_opportunities.title: AI Math Tutor for K-12 Students (Socratic Method)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI math tutor that doesn't just give answers but asks guiding questions, identifies exactly where a student's understanding breaks down, and adapts explanations to their learning level. Charge $19-$49/mo (vs. $50-$150/hr for human tutors). Target parents of students struggling in algebra through AP Calculus. Khan Academy AI Tutor (Khanmigo) validates the demand but leaves room for specialized apps.
top_opportunities.moat: Student progress history and weak-point database creates personalization that improves over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build LLM tutor with Socratic prompting system; add handwriting/photo recognition for student math work; soft-launch in local parent Facebook groups
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI identifies the specific misconception causing errors (confusing negative exponents vs. not understanding order of operations) and addresses the root cause — what human tutors do in $100/session sessions

top_opportunities.title: AI Career Coach for Tech Job Seekers
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI career coach that reviews resumes, rewrites them for ATS systems, generates tailored cover letters for each job, preps for interviews with role-specific practice questions, and tracks application status. Charge $29-$99/mo. The $15B career coaching market charges $200+/hr for services an AI can deliver 24/7 at much lower cost.
top_opportunities.moat: User's resume + application history creates personalization; company-specific interview prep database grows over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build resume → tailored cover letter generator with Claude; add ATS scoring system; launch as Product Hunt project
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI rewrites resume bullets with specific metrics for each target company's JD — a task a human career coach would charge $300+ for per application
